warren_buffett.description: Concentrated value portfolio, long-term buy-and-hold philosophy. Use as benchmark for value investing in forward simulations and stress tests.

ray_dalio_allweather.source: Ray Dalio 'Principles for Navigating Big Debt Crises' + Bridgewater All-Weather strategy documentation
ray_dalio_allweather.description: Risk parity portfolio, multi-asset. Use to compare risk-return profile against concentrated equity portfolios and to demonstrate real-world diversification.

bill_ackman.source: SEC 13-F Pershing Square Capital Management (latest filing)
bill_ackman.description: Concentrated activist portfolio, catalyst-driven. Use to contrast against value (Buffett) and to analyze tracking error and concentration risk.

traditional_60_40.description: Classic 60/40 stocks-bonds benchmark. Use as the universal baseline for multi-asset portfolio comparisons.

momentum_vs_contrarian.source: Built from assets/momentum_sma50_200_returns.csv and assets/contrarian_bbands_returns.csv (course material slide 26-27)
momentum_vs_contrarian.description: Combined trend-following + contrarian strategy portfolio. Demonstrates the course's combined Growth+Momentum+Diversification philosophy. Strategies have negative correlation in different regimes, reducing overall volatility.
